risks.description: Potential confidentiality breach due to improper handling of records
risks.impact: Could lead to legal disputes and financial penalties
risks.evidence: Enron and PGE shall preserve and keep in their possession all records held by them on and after the date hereof which may relate to the businesses of or any claim, action, investigation or proceeding involving the Enron Group, on the one hand, and the PGE Group, on the other hand

risks.description: Tax indemnification exposure may allocate liabilities between the parties.
risks.impact: Potential transfer of tax liabilities between counterparties.

risks.description: Employee benefits indemnification may shift benefits-related liabilities between the parties.
risks.impact: Potential liability allocation for employee benefits obligations.

action_items.description: Preserve records as per agreement terms
action_items.evidence: Each of Enron and PGE shall preserve and keep in its possession all records held by it on and after the date hereof which may relate to the businesses of or any claim, action, investigation or proceeding involving the Enron Group, on the one hand, and the PGE Group, on the other hand

action_items.description: Notify parties of any legal inquiries related to Enron or PGE groups
action_items.evidence: From and after the date of this Agreement and until the Final Release Date, each of Enron and PGE shall, and shall cause each of its Subsidiaries to, (A) provide the other party with notice of any governmental inquiries or investigations or any litigation initiated against the Enron Group or the PGE Group

missing_information: No specific owner is mentioned for certain action items such as preserving records and notifying parties of legal inquiries.
